name: Seam
subtitle: Vintage clothing decision helper
description: Personal iOS app for deciding whether to buy vintage clothing.

apps.name: Seam
apps.subtitle: Vintage clothing buy/skip decisions.
apps.localizedDescription: Compare candidate vintage items against owned items by measurement, price, condition, and duplication risk. Local-first; no auth.
apps.versionDescription:
- Version bump 0.2.0
- Merge pull request #27 from sugarshin/renovate/migrate-config
- Merge pull request #25 from sugarshin/renovate/linters
- Migrate config renovate.json
- Pin dependencies

- Merge pull request #24 from sugarshin/feat/closet-sold-mode
- Add lefthook for pre-commit format and pre-push CI gate
- Apply biome format
- Update dependency ruby to v3.4.9
- Add Sold mode to Closet with Stats drill-down
- Align Expo SDK 54 peers and group react/react-native in Renovate
- Update CLAUDE.md
- Merge pull request #23 from sugarshin/renovate/patch-react-monorepo
- Update renovate config
- Update dependency react to v19.1.6
- Merge pull request #21 from sugarshin/renovate/react-native-0.81.x
- Update dependency react-native to v0.81.6
- Merge pull request #22 from sugarshin/chore/lint-format
- Linter, formatter
- chore(release): update source.json for v0.1.1
